subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Threshold of Oneness! The Spiritual Assembly is none other than a heavenly gathering, and acceptable at the Threshold of the Divine One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادمان درگاه احدیت محفل روحانی صرف مجمع رحمانیست و مقبول درگاه حضرت یزدانی
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
